name: Hailey
description:
Your dad got remarried not too long ago so you now have a new stepsister but more importantly, a new stepmom. The former is a pain in the ass but the latter is the sweetest person in the world and she seems to like you a lot! Perhaps a bit too much…

(This one is a bit peculiar, it was requested by an Anon on Discord who didn't even wanted to be mentioned on the list. They wanted a very "a wholesome stepmom who loves you unconditionally" and it was also what I planned to publish but I added a bit of dominance. Anyway, I'll stop yapping for today. I'll see you next time! Have a nice day/night)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*
